source_quote: The study was not designed to directly compare the arms but rather to evaluate the efficacy of each arm independently. Median OS cohort A: 8.8 months (95% CI, 7.7-14.2), cohort B: 10.3 months (95% CI, 8.5-12.5). No between-arm HR reported for OS.
The study was not designed to directly compare the arms. Median PFS cohort A: 4.1 months (95% CI, 2.8-5.5), cohort B: 1.43 months (95% CI, 1.4-2.7). No between-arm HR reported for PFS.
Reintubation: nHFOV 1 (25%), nCPAP 2 (100%). The small number of study patients in each group precluded any formal statistical comparison.
Treatment failure: nHFOV 2 (50%), nCPAP 2 (100%). The small number of study patients in each group precluded any formal statistical comparison.

outcome: Provider adherence to recommended practice (dichotomous outcomes)
source_quote: No composite provider adherence outcome reported. The study reports difference-in-difference estimates for multiple individual RMNCHN behaviors (e.g., 11 percentage point increase in last-trimester visits, P=0.04; 13 percentage point increase in skin-to-skin care, P<0.01) but no single OR/RR for provider adherence.
